content:
# Final Review Planner Positions
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

All three amendments are valid. Amendments fr-3-182adb87 and fr-3-b0a0bd61 identify the same real issue (stale `final_review_planner` in run.json) — both are correct but overlapping. Amendment fr-3-5a16fec6 correctly identifies stale docs/templates.md entries that no longer match the actual template manifests in template_catalog.rs.

## Votes

- `fr-3-182adb87`: Accept
  Verified: run.json lines 33-36 and 73-76 contain `final_review_planner` but `StageResolutionSnapshot` (model.rs:186-207) has no such field, and `build_final_review_snapshot` (engine.rs:8211-8223) only populates `final_review_reviewers` and `final_review_arbiter`. The persisted data was written by an older code version and is now inconsistent with the schema. Since `StageResolutionSnapshot` uses `#[serde(default, skip_serializing_if)]` annotations, serde will silently ignore unknown fields during deserialization, so this won't cause a runtime crash — but it is still a data integrity issue: the snapshot files claim a planner role that no longer exists in the system, which could mislead anyone inspecting the run state. Scrubbing or regenerating the snapshot is the correct fix.
- `fr-3-5a16fec6`: Accept
  Verified: docs/templates.md line 50 lists `final_review_voter` with optional `planner_positions`, and line 51 lists `final_review_arbiter` requiring `planner_positions`. The actual manifests in template_catalog.rs:445-456 show: voter requires `["title", "amendments", "json_schema"]` with no optional placeholders, and arbiter requires `["amendments", "reviewer_votes", "json_schema"]` with no optional. The docs are stale — `planner_positions` no longer appears anywhere in the source code (grep confirmed zero matches in src/). This documentation drift could cause confusion for anyone writing custom template overrides.
- `fr-3-b0a0bd61`: Accept
  This identifies the same real issue as fr-3-182adb87 — stale `final_review_planner` entries in run.json snapshots that contradict the current schema and builder code. The evidence is identical: model.rs:186-207 defines no planner field, engine.rs:8206-8223 emits none, yet run.json lines 16-36 and 56-80 still contain it. Accept because it is a valid finding; however, note this is a duplicate of fr-3-182adb87 and only one remediation action is needed (scrub both snapshot locations in run.json).
